caption: Two men sit in a room before a television and a shelving unit filled with media cases. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt, while the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace, resting his chin on his hand. Above them, a neon sign glows with the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". A smaller inset video window is superimposed over the center of the scene, showing different clips from a cinematic production. Initially, the inset shows a man in period attire with the caption "Across the river Sindhu". It then transitions to a wide shot of a city skyline by water with the caption "to defeat the Lodi's Sultanate." Subsequent frames show a large, ornate white building and a close-up of a woman in elaborate traditional clothing and jewelry. The two men remain relatively still, maintaining neutral or contemplative expressions throughout the sequence.
